CustomField.formula: IF( ISBLANK(Legacy_Created_Date__c), IF( NOT( ISBLANK(SVMX_PS_Date_Closed__c) ), SVMX_PS_Date_Closed__c - DATEVALUE(CreatedDate), TODAY() - DATEVALUE(CreatedDate) ), IF( NOT( ISBLANK(SVMX_PS_Date_Closed__c) ), SVMX_PS_Date_Closed__c - DATEVALUE(Legacy_Created_Date__c), TODAY() - DATEVALUE(Legacy_Created_Date__c) ) )
CustomField.label: Days on Alert
